'''Storm''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]], and the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]], located within the [[Chommell sector/Legends|Chommell sector]] on [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> Its thirty-two [[Moon/Legends|moons]] included its [[Unidentified third moon of Storm|third moon]] and its [[Unidentified tenth moon of Storm|tenth moon]], which housed a [[Prison/Legends|penal colony]] and [[Tagge Company/Legends|Tagge Company]] outpost respectively.<ref name="SoN">''[[Secrets of Naboo]]''</ref>
